task_completion.description: Open the initial draft document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open displaying the contents of 'case_manual_draft.docx'.

task_completion.description: Insert bookmarks at the start of each of the eight chapter headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bookmark dialog box is visible showing a list of created bookmarks, or bookmark indicators are visible next to the chapter headings in the document.

task_completion.description: Add a new page at the beginning of the document titled 'Quick Navigation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new first page is visible with the heading 'Quick Navigation' at the top.

task_completion.description: List the eight chapter titles on the 'Quick Navigation' page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Quick Navigation' page contains a list of the eight specific chapter titles.

task_completion.description: Make each title on the 'Quick Navigation' page an internal hyperlink pointing to its corresponding chapter bookmark.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chapter titles on the 'Quick Navigation' page are formatted as hyperlinks (e.g., blue and underlined), or a hyperlink dialog box is visible showing a title being linked to a specific document bookmark.
A 'Save As' dialog box shows the file being saved as 'case_manual_navigable.docx' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory, or the word processor's title bar reflects the new filename.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to edit the document rather than terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer, not a terminal window running Python scripts or CLI text processing tools.

integrity.description: The agent actually created functional internal hyperlinks rather than just formatting text to look like links.
integrity.visual_evidence: The hyperlink creation dialog box is used, or hovering over the links shows a tooltip indicating an internal document destination.

integrity.description: The agent used the word processor's built-in bookmark feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The official 'Insert Bookmark' dialog or sidebar is used to create the targets for the hyperlinks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/case_manual_draft.docx. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/case_manual_navigable.docx. The document must contain exactly 8 bookmarks and 8 hyperlinks corresponding to the following chapter titles: 'Intake and Assessment Procedures', 'Service Planning and Goal Setting', 'Crisis Intervention Protocols', 'Documentation and Record Keeping', 'Client Rights and Confidentiality', 'Interagency Coordination and Referrals', 'Quality Assurance and Program Evaluation', and 'Staff Training and Professional Development'.
